title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Lombard

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Lombard
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, ICICI Lombard in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Lombard:
ICICI Lombard is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard!
